summary: Change reduces visual noise in intervention question comments, renders per-option `text` code fences, moves verbose context into a details block, and preserves machine-readable metadata. Tests and CI passed.

requirement_checks.requirement: Question comments show a short visible summary, question ID, and recommended answer near the top
evidence: scripts/lib/github-messages.mjs: summaryFacts composed and pushed to rendered lines (lines ~683-697 in commit 52b3d4e)
tests/github-messages.test.mjs: asserts for facts line (lines asserting facts in test 'renderInterventionQuestionComment renders concise header with per-option fences')

requirement_checks.requirement: Each answer appears in its own `text` code fence with a human-readable label explaining the outcome
evidence: scripts/lib/github-messages.mjs: per-option loop emits '```text' fence and '/factory answer <id>' command for each option (lines ~716-725 in commit 52b3d4e)
tests/github-messages.test.mjs: asserts two '```text' fences and specific lines for first and second option commands in the new test

requirement_checks.requirement: The separate visible options section is removed
evidence: tests/github-messages.test.mjs: asserts that the rendered comment does not include '### Options'
scripts/lib/github-messages.mjs: new layout constructs '### Answers' and omits previous options bullet list

requirement_checks.requirement: Context is moved below the answer section into a `<details>` block when present
evidence: scripts/lib/github-messages.mjs: renders '<details>' when detail is non-empty (lines ~728-737 in commit 52b3d4e)
tests/github-messages.test.mjs: asserts presence of '<details>' and the expected summary line in the primary test, and absence in the 'no detail' test

requirement_checks.requirement: Preserve the existing machine-readable hidden metadata block in the question comment
evidence: scripts/lib/github-messages.mjs: appends '<!-- factory-question: ${metadata} -->' at the end of the rendered comment
tests/github-messages.test.mjs: parses the metadata JSON and asserts object shape

requirement_checks.requirement: Update tests to assert new structure and behavior
evidence: tests/github-messages.test.mjs: new tests added for concise header, per-option fences, unknown effect fallback, missing detail behavior, and missing recommended option
CI: unit tests passed (workflow run id: 23392704836)

requirement_checks.requirement: Introduce a helper to derive effect descriptions for known option.effect values
evidence: scripts/lib/github-messages.mjs: OPTION_EFFECT_HINTS and describeOptionEffect introduced near top of file
tests: behavior validated via tests asserting presence/absence of effect hints

findings.title: Add explicit test for empty options array
findings.details: Implementation renders a fallback message when `options.length === 0`, but there is no explicit unit test asserting that fallback behavior.
findings.recommendation: Add a small test case that constructs an intervention with an empty options array and asserts the fallback text 'No answers available.' or similar behavior.

findings.title: Consider exporting effect hint map
findings.details: The `OPTION_EFFECT_HINTS` map is private to `github-messages.mjs`. If future renderers should reuse the same human-readable wording, duplicating the mapping could cause drift.
findings.recommendation: Optionally export the hints or move them to a shared utility so other modules can reuse the same strings.
